name: ejentum-mcp
description: MCP server with four cognitive harness tools (harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, harness_memory) that AI agents call before generating. Two install paths: stdio via `npx -y ejentum-mcp` (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, Claude Code), or hosted HTTPS at https://api.ejentum.com/mcp (n8n MCP Client and any HTTP-MCP client; Bearer auth via EJENTUM_API_KEY). Each tool returns a structured prompt: a named failure pattern, an executable procedure, suppression vectors, and a falsification test for self-verification.
author: Ejentum <info@ejentum.com>
